texto: What I should have said is that he thinks that there is a conflict between evolutionary biology and theism. Dennett thinks that evolutionary theory shows that it is irrational to believe that God exists
autor: he thinks that the theory has this consequence because he thinks that the Design Argument was the only remotely plausible argument for God’s existence and evolutionary theory destroyed that argument.
explicacao: Orientação direta de he thinks that the theory has this consequence because he thinks that the Design Argument was the only remotely plausible argument for God’s existence and evolutionary theory destroyed that argument. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “What I should have said is that he thinks that there is a conflict between evolutionary biology a…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, elliott-sober, thinks, útil em momentos de reflexao.
